chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Misc. Appl. No. S- 562 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 17.02.2025 For orders on office objections For hearing of main case Mr. Shewak Rathore, D.P.G. Respondent / Proposed Accused Ali Raza present in person Respondent / Proposed Accused Ali Raza present in person; however, neither the Applicant is present nor his Counsel. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. Record shows that Counsel for Applicant lastly appeared in the mater in 2021 and thereafter he never turned up. On the contrary respondent / proposed accused was present on the last date of hearing also. Deliberate and intentional absence of Applicant and his Counsel shows their lack of interest in pursuing this matter without any useful progress. In the circumstances, the matter stands dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
